etymology.description: 圥(土 + 木) + 丮(“to hold”) = kneeling person planting sapling -> original form of 蓺 and 藝
etymology.interpretation: 埶(埶) (yì, 'art') combines the left component 圥, symbolizing a sapling being planted into the soil, with the right component 丮, meaning 'to hold,' illustrating the act of planting. This character eventually became the original form for 藝(藝) (yì, 'art') and was phonetically borrowed for 勢(勢) (shì, 'power').
